title: OpenAPI Info Object
description: Schema for the OpenAPI Specification Info Object, which provides metadata about the API.

summary.description: A short summary of the API (OAS 3.1+).

description.description: A description of the API. CommonMark markdown is supported.

termsOfService.description: URL to the Terms of Service for the API.

version.description: The version of the OpenAPI document (not the specification version).

Contact.description: Contact information for the exposed API.

License.description: License information for the exposed API.
